roa.docketEntryComment: DEFT'S PC1538,5 MOTION TO SUPPRESS EVIDENCE FILED

/CAL: ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/LDPX: 12-01-21 (10TH)//X: THE 60TH LAST DAY IS 01-14-22/ACM/X: CHECK-IN 3X/WEEK BY PHONE OR INPERSON; ATTEND THINKING FOR A CHANGE CLASSES/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE,THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: SFSOCOMMUNITY PROGRAMS WILL PLACE AN ELECTRONIC MONITORING DEVICE ON THE DEFENDANT PRIOR TO RELEASE FROM CUSTODY AND WILL PROVIDE ALL INSTRUCTIONS AT THATTIME,/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CONTD: PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/TE: 1 HOUR/
